footer.tagline: Full-stack developer (backend-focused). Building business operations systems — HRIS & payroll, POS, inventory, and multi-tenant SaaS.

home.heroTitle: I build business operations systems — <accent>from database to UI.</accent>
home.heroSubtitle: I'm Oksa Satya, a full-stack developer (backend-focused). 4+ years building enterprise applications for a Dubai software house — and building Dexova, an ERP platform (HRIS, payroll, POS, inventory) for Indonesian businesses.
home.heroImgDashboard: Dexova HRIS admin dashboard: daily attendance and department summary
home.heroImgPwa: Dexova employee attendance PWA with geofenced check-in
home.snapshotStatus: building Dexova and shipping enterprise application features from Dubai.
home.featuredTitle: Dexova — an ERP platform for Indonesian businesses
home.featuredIntro: HR, payroll, cashier, and stock usually live in separate tools — out of sync and error-prone. Dexova unifies them: four business modules on one Go backend, used through three production apps.
home.featuredScreenshotAlt: Dexova HR module: managing job levels with default roles
home.projectsIntro: Beyond Dexova — systems I built end-to-end for clients: the business problem, the technical decisions, and the results.
home.capabilitiesIntro: Eight areas — each with technology I actually run in production, not a logo wall.
home.experienceIntro: Not a job timeline — the problems faced and what came out of them.
home.articlesIntro: Technical notes from building production business systems.
home.contactTitle: Have a system to build — or a role to fill?
home.contactIntro: Freelance projects, remote full-stack roles, or technical consultation — I usually reply within 24 hours.

contactPage.title: Let's talk
contactPage.intro: Freelance projects, remote roles, technical consultation, or collaboration — tell me what you need and I'll help map the solution.

aboutPage.title: About me
aboutPage.intro1: I'm Oksa Satya — a full-stack developer with a backend focus. Since 2022 I've built enterprise applications for PT Infini Software House Technology (Dubai), and on the side I build Dexova, an ERP platform for Indonesian businesses.
aboutPage.intro2: What I enjoy most: turning messy business processes — manual attendance, spreadsheet payroll, stock that never matches — into systems that run themselves and can be audited.

servicePage.title: Services
servicePage.intro: Website, web application, and API development — not just "done", but systems that solve a business problem and are built to grow.
servicePage.waMessage: Hi Oksa, I'd like to discuss a project.
servicePage.proofIntro: The same standards as the systems I build and operate myself:
